title: How to Create a Client Pitch With AI — From Prompt to PDF in 15 Minutes
summary: A YouTube video demonstrates using Venngage AI's one-pager generator to create a client pitch PDF in 15 minutes. The workflow covers content generation, design, editing, visuals, and export, showcasing an end-to-end AI-powered document creation process for marketing materials.
writeup: The video walks through Venngage AI's one-pager generator to build a client pitch PDF in about 15 minutes, covering content generation, design, editing, visuals, and export. It matters because it shows an end-to-end AI-assisted workflow for producing marketing documents rather than a single isolated step. The takeaway is a concrete sequence: generate the pitch content, apply and edit the design, add visuals, and export to PDF.
